title: Tabernaemontana tsiangiana
taxonomy: Tabernaemontana tsiangiana is classified under the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Tabernaemontana and is native to China. Within the species classification, Tabernaemontana tsiangiana is recognized as a distinct species by botanists. This classification helps in understanding the plant's relationships with other species and its place within the larger plant kingdom.
